scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run --workspace=src/shared build && npm run --workspace=src/backend build && npm run --workspace=src/frontend build && npm run --workspace=electron build && npm run build:daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run --workspace=src/shared typecheck && npm run --workspace=src/backend typecheck && npm run --workspace=src/frontend typecheck
